title: DAJAVE 4 Pack Quiche Tin 9 Inch Quiche Dish with Loose Bottom, Tart Tins for Baking Large Pie Tin Carbon Steel Flan Tins for Baking Quiches, Tart, Pie
features: 【Premium Baking Performance】The pie tin is made of thickened carbon steel, sturdy, durable and not easy to deform or crack, In addition, the quiche dish has super thermal conductivity and making your tart quiche pie heated evenly, and saving more cooking time

【Removable Bottom Design】This quiche tins with loose base, you can easily detach the base from the pan, which is great for you to separate the pie from the plate without damaging the shape of the pie, Besides, the pie tins edges are designed with firm fluted design for making exquisite wavy shape pies

【Non-Stick Coating】Our flan case is covered with food grade non stick coating, safe to use, which is perfect for making it easier to release the mould, reducing food residue on the surface and making it easier for you to clean it, Tips: To extend the service life of the flan tin, please do not use steel wire balls to wash

【Package Include】You will receive 4pcs flan cases, the size is 24x24x3cm, which is suitable for your daily baking needs, You can use flan case tin to bake any pies you like, having a good time with your friends and family

【Wide Application】The 9inch pie tin is perfect for baking pumpkin pie, mince pies, apple pie, muffins, flans , pizza, berry tarts, chocolate tarts and other delicious desserts, Great for using in home or restaurant to make the delicious pies
description: 9 Inch Quiche Dish Non Stick Pie Tins Flan Tins with Loose Base Carbon Steel Flan Case Tin for Baking Quiches, Tart and Pie Why choose our product? We will provide 4pcs 24x24x3cm flan tins with loose base, the size is enough for you to baking most pies you like, suitable for using in daily life. The 9 inch tart tin is made of premium carbon steel, sturdy and durable, and has super thermal conductivity and making your tart quiche pie heated evenly. The pie tins for baking have removable base design, you can easily separate the pie from the plate without damaging the shape of the pie. The metal pie tin is covered with food grade non stick coating, which is good for reducing food residue on the surface and making it easier for you to clean it. The 24cm flan dish is perfect for you to bake a variety of tasty pies for dinner, also great for baking dessert at various parties, such as cream cheese cakes, lemon pie, flans, pizza, chocolate tarts and other delicious desserts. Specification Material: Carbon Steel Color: Black Size: 24x24x3cm Package Include 4 x Non Stick Pie Tins
